canonical_definition: Real-world dataset of 837,989 conversations from 167,062 users interacting with a ChatGPT mirror site over one year, used to analyze conceptual diversity trends before and after GPT version updates.
papers: Position: Societal Impacts Research Requires Benchmarks for Creative Composition Tasks
The Lock-in Hypothesis: Stagnation by Algorithm
